title: oftia revoluta
intro: Oftia revoluta, also known as Desert Lavender, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Oftia revoluta include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Oftia revoluta can be made into teas, salves, and essential oils for topical application, with the flowers being the most commonly used part for medicinal purposes.
